steps.title: Use the example as a clue
steps.content: The colon introduces an example: the first description of the seven-day week appears in the Sumerian Epic of Gilgamesh. That example shows Sumerian civilization as the source of concepts that still persist.

steps.title: Choose the source meaning
steps.content: A would mean Sumerian civilization changed concepts that already existed. C would mean it received the concepts from elsewhere, reversing the logic. D would mean it failed to notice them, contradicting the example. The answer is B.
